selected_title: The Research on Outsourcing of Human Resource Management(HRM)
question: What mechanism does Jianfei Lu identify in “The Research on Outsourcing of Human Resource Management(HRM)” that deepens the evidence from “AN EXPLORATORY ASSESSMENT OF THE LINKAGES BETWEEN HRM PRACTICES, ABSORPTIVE CAPACITY, AND INNOVATION IN OUTSOURCING RELATIONSHIPS”?

evidence_spans.text: As global economic integration and the rapid development of information technology,more and more enterprises outsource business they are not good at,and achieve a superior position in the market filled with fierce competition.At present,most human resource management outsourcing is being taken for the purpose of achieving greater efficiency and enhancing core competence.Starting from the definition of outsourcing,this paper defines the concept of the outsourcing of human resources management,and compares the different way of using human resources outsourcing between domestic and foreign enterprises,analyzes the advantages of the management of human resources outsourcing,discusses the process and steps of human resource management outsourcing from five aspects in detail.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Outsourcing, Knowledge process outsourcing through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 104 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
